name: BVNK
description: Enterprise stablecoin payments infrastructure unifying fiat and stablecoin rails via a single API.

seo.title: BVNK — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: BVNK: Enterprise stablecoin payments infrastructure unifying fiat and stablecoin rails via a single API.

when_to_use: Enterprise stablecoin payroll and B2B settlement across borders
Unifying fiat and stablecoin payments through single enterprise API
Cross-border treasury operations replacing correspondent banking with USDC
Fintech platform issuing stablecoin-backed accounts to business clients

review.verdict: Serious choice for enterprises wanting stablecoin payments infrastructure without building custody themselves.
review.best_for: Enterprises moving large B2B volumes across fiat and stablecoin rails
review.not_for: Small merchants or teams wanting simple card acceptance

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
